items.title: American Express Transfer Bonus: 20% To Marriott (1:1.2)
items.summary: Some American Express members are being targeted for a 20% transfer bonus to Marriott. Normally you can transfer 1,000 Membership Rewards points to 1,000 Marriott points. Under this promotion you’d receive 1,200 Marriott points

items.title: Massive Chase Sapphire Reserve bonus ending soon: Earn 150,000 valuable points
items.summary: The Chase Sapphire Reserve is currently offering 150,000 Ultimate Rewards points. Here's what to know if you're considering applying.

items.title: Credit card transfer bonuses (June): 55% to Marriott, 50% to Turkish Airlines, 30% to Southwest and more
items.summary: Here's a look at all the current transfer bonuses involving major credit cards and airline and hotel loyalty programs.

items.title: Bilt Palladium Cardholders Are Seeing $50,000 Limits — And Payments Freeing Up Credit Faster
items.summary: The Bilt Palladium Card has been my primary spending card, but two rollout problems made that harder than it should have been: a lower-than-expected credit limit and slow payment holds. Now my limit has jumped to $50,000 and payments appear to be freeing up available credit much faster.

items.title: American Airlines And Alaska Elites Now Get Hotel Status And Discounts At Taj, The Pierre And 630 Hotels
items.summary: oneworld elites are getting a new hotel benefit: discounts and status across Taj, The Pierre, St. James Court, Vivanta, Ginger and more than 600 other Indian Hotels Company properties. For American and Alaska elites, this turns airline status into hotel savings and Taj InnerCircle - NeuPass status —

items.title: Transfer Amex Points To Air France-KLM Flying Blue With 25% Bonus: Worth It?
items.summary: Amex Membership Rewards has just rolled out its newest airline points transfer bonus, which I’m sure many members will find to be valuable (I certainly do, and will be moving over lots of points). I’d consider this to be more useful than the 20% transfer bonus to Marriott Bonvoy.
